activities_projects.title: Lesson Title and Theme
activities_projects.objective: Identify the title and basic theme of the lesson
steps: Read the lesson title carefully
Write the title in your notebook
Write 2–3 lines about what the lesson is about

activities_projects.title: Main Idea of the Lesson
activities_projects.objective: Understand the central idea of the story
steps: Read the lesson once
Identify the main idea
Write it in 3–4 simple sentences

activities_projects.title: Characters Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify important characters in the story
steps: List the main characters from the lesson
Write one line about each character

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Write any four important events in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
steps: Choose five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Frame one sentence for each word

activities_projects.title: Favourite Line Activity
activities_projects.objective: Encourage personal response to the story
steps: Select one favourite line from the lesson
Write 2–3 lines explaining why you liked it

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the moral or message of the lesson
steps: Think about the message of the story
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Short Summary Writing
steps: Read the lesson again
Write a short summary in 5–6 lines

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real-life situations
steps: Think about how the lesson connects to real life
Write 3–4 sentences explaining the connection

activities_projects.title: Scene Drawing Activity
steps: Draw a scene from the story Bholi
Write one sentence explaining the scene
